message.content: {"items":[{"title":"German National Election Study 1972 (GESIS Panel)", "url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13509", "justification":"GESIS-hosted panel study on voting behavior and political attitudes in Germany, conducted around the 1972 federal election in the 1970s."},{"title":"Politbarometer 1977-1979 (ICY Data)", "url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13499", "justification":"GESIS-hosted public-opinion tracking survey on political attitudes in Germany, starting in the late 1970s."},{"title":"German Election Study 1976: Pre- and Post-Election Survey", "url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13497", "justification":"GESIS data set covering political behavior and attitudes around the 1976 federal election in Germany."},{"title":"German Election Study 1972: Pre- and Post-Election Survey", "url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13480", "justification":"GESIS-hosted survey capturing voters’ attitudes and political behavior during the 1972 German federal election."},{"title":"Panel Study Political Decision-Making in the Federal Republic of Germany 1971–1980", "url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13512", "justification":"Longitudinal GESIS panel on political decision-making processes and attitudes in 1970s Germany."}]}
